name: swarm-release-claude
description: Release coordination for AI coding agents, backed by the hosted Swarm Release Manager store. Lifts release-planning state out of repo-local JSON into a shared store the release-* skills read and drive over REST — so claims, drift, and startability are the same across machines, people, and agents.

srm_token.title: SRM API token
srm_token.description: Your personal Swarm Release Manager API token. Stored in your system keychain, never in a repo. The store URL and project come from the repo's release-config.json.
